title: Algerian Dumplings
description: Delicious and traditional Algerian-style dumplings, perfect for a cozy evening. Serve with your favorite dipping sauce.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine yeast, water, and salt. Let it sit for 5 minutes.
2. Add flour, mashed potatoes, and chopped parsley. Mix until a dough forms.
3. Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
4. Divide the dough into 4-6 pieces, depending on how large you want your dumplings to be.
5. Roll each piece into a ball and then flatten it slightly into a disk shape.
6. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
7. Place the dumplings in the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until they are golden brown.
8. Serve the dumplings hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
9. Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
